rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN VS. JOHN YO WONG, DOING BUSINESS AS BANKER REALTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Department Of Fair Employment And Housing Notice Of And Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 15, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S Motion To Enforce Settlement. GRANTED. A judgment for $350,000 shall enter. Request for pre-judgment interest is denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN VS. JOHN YO WONG, DOING BUSINESS AS BANKER REALTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 15, 2017, line 1. INTERVENORS IRENE REYNOSO, HOUSING EQUALITY LAW PROJECT'S Joinder Of Motion To Enforce Settlement. GRANTED. A judgment for $350,000 shall enter. Request for pre-judgment interest is denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT EICHHORN VS. GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 15, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS GRAND PACIFIC HOTEL, QUOCK WONG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. GRANTED without leave to amend. Based on the moving papers and plaintiff's unauthorized 25 page single-spaced opposition, the second amended complaint is unintelligible without facts to support each element of each cause of action, including damages and breach of duty. =(501/REQ)
